name: Pickeled Jalapenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pack jalapeno peppers tightly into hot jars.
2. Combine remaining ingredients in an enameled or glass saucepan and bring to boil.
3. Cover peppers with boiling liquid, leaving 1/2 inch head-space.
4. Seal jars with sterilized two-piece canning lids.
5. Process jars in boiling water, ensuring they are covered by at least 2 inches for 10 minutes.
6. Remove jars from water and let cool on a rack.
7. Store for up to 30 days before using.
